title: Data Masking
description: Protect sensitive data with configurable masking rules
rules.title: Masking Rules
rules.noRulesDescription: Create your first masking rule to get started
rules.templates.name: Name
sandbox.title: Sandbox Configuration
sandbox.validPathDescription: This directory is accessible and writable
sandbox.notConfiguredDescription: Please configure the sandbox directory first
sandbox.helpItems.storage: All masked files will be stored in this directory
sandbox.helpItems.encryption: Mapping data will be encrypted and stored locally
sandbox.helpItems.restriction: Only files within this directory can be uploaded to Dify
sandbox.helpItems.space: Choose a location with sufficient storage space
sandbox.errors.protected: Cannot use system protected directory as sandbox
masking.title: File Masking
masking.noRules: No masking rules available, please create rules first
masking.successDescription: Masked file has been saved to sandbox directory
masking.errors.noRules: Please select at least one masking rule
masking.encryption.title: Set Mapping File Encryption Passphrase
masking.encryption.description: The mapping file contains original sensitive data and will be encrypted with a passphrase. Please keep this passphrase safe as it will be required for reverse masking.
masking.encryption.warning: ⚠️ Please save this passphrase! It is required for reverse masking and cannot be recovered if lost.
masking.encryption.customPlaceholder: Enter at least 32 characters for the passphrase
masking.encryption.lengthWarning: Passphrase too short, please enter at least 32 characters
restore.decrypt.title: Enter Decryption Passphrase
restore.decrypt.description: This mapping file is encrypted. Global passphrase decryption failed or not configured. Please manually enter the passphrase that was set during creation.
restore.decrypt.lengthWarning: Passphrase too short, requires at least 32 characters
restore.decrypt.error: Decryption failed: incorrect passphrase or corrupted data
settings.encryptionDescription: Encrypt exported mapping files with a 32-character passphrase
settings.encryptionEnabled: ✓ Mapping files will be encrypted with AES-256-GCM and require passphrase to decrypt
settings.passphraseLengthWarning: Passphrase too short, requires at least 32 characters
settings.passphraseWarning: ⚠️ Please keep this passphrase safe. It is required for reverse masking and cannot be recovered if lost.
settings.usageNote: Mapping file encryption is enabled by default and can be disabled here
files.title: Masked Files
files.noFilesDescription: Masked files will appear here after masking
files.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete
